name: Hong Gil-dong
headline: Senior Data Platform Engineer
summary: Data platform engineer building reliable ingestion, warehouse, and orchestration systems for analytics and ML teams.

bullets: Built orchestration and data quality workflows for batch and streaming pipelines used across analytics teams.
Improved warehouse modeling and transformation review processes with dbt standards and reusable checks.
Partnered with ML teams on feature pipeline reliability and dataset freshness monitoring.
Implemented event ingestion paths and warehouse marts for product and business reporting.
Maintained Airflow DAGs, Spark jobs, and schema change workflows across multiple stakeholders.

projects.name: Warehouse Quality Guardrails
projects.subtitle: Automated checks for ingestion and marts
bullets: Added lineage-aware checks and freshness alerts for critical marts supporting weekly decision making.
Reduced broken downstream dashboards by catching schema drift before scheduled transformations ran.
